about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of how people experience health, technology, and daily life. From designing systems that translate complex biomarker data into clear, actionable insights, to building interfaces that empower individuals to take ownership of their wellbeing — my mind is constantly solving the problems that sit between human need and human understanding.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it is my ability to hold systems thinking and human empathy simultaneously that defines how I work. I design for outcomes, not aesthetics alone.
about.quote.text: I begin with deep empathy for the user, and my work ends with measurable impact on their life.
about.title: A designer who thinks in systems and feels in outcomes
about.value.0.desc: Every project begins with a genuine commitment to understanding the real human problem — not the assumed one.
about.value.0.title: Research-led
about.value.1.desc: The smallest gap in a regulated flow or data-dense interface can erode trust irreparably. Precision is non-negotiable.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Clear communication across product, engineering, and executive stakeholders is the fastest route to shipping the right thing.
about.value.2.title: Cross-functional communicator
about.value.3.desc: Designs are only as valuable as the outcomes they drive. Every decision is measured against the metric it moves.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the AI persona platform directly informed targeted member engagement strategies and personalized health journey communications that reversed a negative margin trajectory. The business moved from a –17% operating margin to +2%, improved member retention and subscription renewals, increased average order value, and reduced friction for new member onboarding — demonstrating how ethically applied generative AI, grounded in behavioral research and privacy-first design principles, can drive measurable commercial outcomes in regulated consumer health environments.

modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in member retention and subscription renewals from actionable behavioral and health journey insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average order value and member lifetime value through personalized engagement.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced member onboarding friction — proactively addressing needs at the highest-drop moments in the member health journey.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled health data awareness across ~40 users spanning sales, member services, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted persona generation platform built on live behavioral intelligence data — combining structured demographic, psychological, and health journey insights to enable teams to understand not just who members are, but how and why they make health and purchasing decisions.

modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive token-based design system to modernize a fragmented web and member portal experience spanning health product marketing, sales, consumer-facing member reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable system improving compliance consistency, scalability, and execution speed — aligning design decisions with member health outcomes and business goals.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent, HIPAA-aligned design patterns across all consumer health products — eliminating inconsistencies between designers and regulated compliance gaps.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Unified source of truth in Figma (variables, auto-layout, full state coverage) clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations across all design artifacts.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between ethical UX strategy and business goals — embedding compliance intent directly into design system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior designers through clear, repeatable token-based component patterns with full state coverage documentation.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Executive trust gained through visible, consistent standards referenced across all org-wide consumer health deliverables.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the token-based system lives in Figma with variables, auto-layout, and full state coverage — referenced directly in Contentful — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, compliance consistency, design quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic health experience capability.

modal.project.2.challenge: I defined the experience strategy and end-to-end design for a new member onboarding and subscription activation flow — addressing the most friction-laden moments in the consumer health member journey. The core challenge was twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to activate their health membership in compliance with all regulatory requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understood the health and wellness value of both the products and the membership opportunity — without confusion, friction, or loss of trust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Member Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn Reduction
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified member health value proposition — reducing hesitation and confusion at subscription tier selection.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in member onboarding through clearer HIPAA-aligned data expectations and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class, compliance-forward experience.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward deeper health engagement and community participation.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable, HIPAA-aligned member onboarding framework supporting long-term retention and health journey growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes member onboarding as a guided health journey rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, information architecture, and subscription mechanics across landing pages, onboarding flows, and activation confirmation. The experience is designed to encourage first-time visitors to activate with confidence and move toward deeper health engagement. The result is a scalable, privacy-first foundation that improves conversion, reduces abandonment at critical health journey moments, and supports sustainable member growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the member health journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion — an update that can potentially support both revenue and long-term member health outcomes.

modal.project.4.category: Consumer Health Commerce · Regulated Retail Operations
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end redesign of cart and checkout for a high-growth consumer health membership company facing critical revenue leakage from abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining member trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern consumer health standards positioned this as a business recovery initiative — not a visual refresh. Every design decision had to satisfy both conversion best practices and HIPAA-aligned data handling requirements.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Member Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Abandonment Reduction
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Member Trust Signal
modal.project.4.kpi.3.label: Target Go-Live
modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience addressing member uncertainty at the point of health product purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive load in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary steps and HIPAA-aligned data ambiguity.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled health membership subscriptions as a first-class action directly within the cart experience.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern consumer health UX standards — closing the gap with top-performing regulated membership products.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Growth in member revenue, retention, and health trust metrics through isolated, measurable UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring member trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling health-outcome-positive behaviors directly within the cart experience — including subscription activation, health product upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that aligns interaction decisions with member health outcomes and business growth.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing cart and checkout as a member health growth system rather than a technical necessity — early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster checkout completion, and a measurable lift in membership subscription adoption, directly impacting member health outcomes and revenue.

modal.project.4.title: Member Cart & Checkout
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure in a consumer health product catalog. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing members to rely on external search engines to find health products — directly undermining member confidence, health journey completion, and subscription conversion.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: AI-Powered Health Search
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in Health Product SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Member Revenue & Retention Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore member trust in on-site health product search — prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce member effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no health product results — rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to membership cart and subscription checkout through intelligent health product recommendations.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across health products, clinician content, member support, and wellness resources into a single coherent experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish intelligent search as a strategic member health tool and retention lever supporting subscription activation and long-term engagement.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Consumer health search is a core member experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer trained on health product and wellness content, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide members when health intent is unclear, and surface recommendations that accelerate membership subscription and long-term health journey actions.

Early validation shows faster time-to-product, clearer paths to subscription and membership activation, and meaningful efficiency gains across member conversion flows.
